description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Qt6 that triggers on push, pull request, and published release events, ignoring README.md, LICENSE, and BUILD.md. The workflow builds a project on Windows with Qt6, using a matrix strategy for different Qt versions, build types, and platforms. It checks out the repository, installs Python 3.9, restores submodules, installs the MSVC compiler, caches Qt, installs Qt, generates dependencies, builds the project, packages the output, and uploads the artifact to GitHub.
